findings.description: PascalCase class/exception names referenced in s4 flow step descriptions are missing from hints: `ProcessAbnormalEnd` (abort flow: "VM系のエラーやProcessAbnormalEnd"), `DataReader` (notfound flow: "DataReader.NoMoreRecord"), `ProcessStop` (termination flow: "プロセス停止要求（ProcessStop）"). These are concrete identifiers a user might search for.
findings.source_evidence: abort flow: 'ProcessAbnormalEnd'; notfound flow: 'DataReader.NoMoreRecord をリターンする'; termination flow: 'プロセス停止要求(ProcessStop)を捕捉'
